characters.name: open/close all folders
characters.description: Ambiguously Related: In the original series, the Teletubbies were called friends and never mentioned to be family of some sort. Even in a few episodes, Laa-Laa and Dipsy pecked on the lips. 21 years later, an official Facebook post stated them to be siblings along with the Tiddlytubbies in the 2015 reboot. Whether Ragdoll (who made them before giving them to Wildbrain) actually made them as family or it was Wildbrain's decision to make them siblings, it remains a theory.In January 2026, creator Anne Wood's son, Chris, revealedthey were in fact just friends for the original series. In January 2026, creator Anne Wood's son, Chris, revealedthey were in fact just friends for the original series. Catchphrase:"Eh-oh!""Uh-oh!""Naughty Noo-Noo!""Again, again!" Cheerful Child: They all act very happy children. Chromatic Arrangement: The three male Teletubbies (two from the reboot) with darker skin tone follow this: Duggle Dee (Red), Dipsy (Green) and Baa (Blue)

characters.name: The Teletubbies
characters.description: Ambiguously Related: In the original series, the Teletubbies were called friends and never mentioned to be family of some sort. Even in a few episodes, Laa-Laa and Dipsy pecked on the lips. 21 years later, an official Facebook post stated them to be siblings along with the Tiddlytubbies in the 2015 reboot. Whether Ragdoll (who made them before giving them to Wildbrain) actually made them as family or it was Wildbrain's decision to make them siblings, it remains a theory.In January 2026, creator Anne Wood's son, Chris, revealedthey were in fact just friends for the original series. In January 2026, creator Anne Wood's son, Chris, revealedthey were in fact just friends for the original series. Catchphrase:"Eh-oh!""Uh-oh!""Naughty Noo-Noo!""Again, again!" Cheerful Child: They all act very happy children. Chromatic Arrangement: The three male Teletubbies (two from the reboot) with darker skin tone follow this: Duggle Dee (Red), Dipsy (Green) and Baa (Blue)

characters.name: Tinky Winky
characters.description: The oldest and biggest Teletubby. Although he is big, he is also very gentle and kind. Has purple fur. His favorite thing is his red handbag. Is best friends with Po. Ambiguously Gay: Due his fur being purple - a 'girly' color, his effeminate behavior, and him carrying around a red handbag, people tend to think at first glance he is not much of a masculine guy. Which is not a wrong assumption. The Big Guy: Is the biggest and oldest of the team. Butt-Monkey: Often falls over and experiences bad luck at a few instances (such as being chased by the Noo-Noo in one episode, slipping on Tubby Custard, getting his bed hogged by Po, and so on). Catchphrase:"Tinky Winky bag!""Pinkle winkle, Tinky Winky, pinkle winkle, Tinky Winky!"

characters.name: Dipsy
characters.description: The second oldest and second biggest Teletubby. He is stubborn, sarcastic and sometimes prefers to be alone but mostly still plays with the other Teletubbies. Has green fur. His favorite thing is his cow-spotted hat. Is best friends with Laa-Laa. Brooding Boy, Gentle Girl: With Laa-Laa, he is the snarky and stubborn yet caring brooding boy. Butt-Monkey: Not the same type as Tinky Winky, but he often loses his hat to a large gust of wind or the Noo-Noo. Primarily in the former's case, he will chase it or look for it. Catchphrase:"Dipsy hat!""Bup-a-tum, Bup-a-tum, Bup-a-tum!" "Bup-a-tum, Bup-a-tum, Bup-a-tum!"

characters.name: Laa-Laa
characters.description: The second youngest and second smallest Teletubby. She is bubbly, very kind and caring, dramatic, and motherly. Has yellow fur. Her favorite thing is her big orange ball. Is best friends with Dipsy. Aerith and Bob: Her name is patterned with Nala from The Lion King. Brooding Boy, Gentle Girl: With Dipsy, she is the jovial, yet friendly and warm gentle girl. Catchphrase:"Laa-Laa ball!""Bibbaly cheese!""Laa-laa-li-laa-laa-li-laa-li-laa!" "Laa-laa-li-laa-laa-li-laa-li-laa!"

characters.name: Po
characters.description: The youngest and smallest of the Teletubbies. She is cute, shy, quiet, mischievous, attention-loving, and can speak Cantonese. Has red fur. Her favorite thing is her blue and pink scooter. Is best friends with Tinky Winky. The Baby of the Bunch: She is the youngest of the Teletubbies. Badass Adorable: She maybe cute-looking, but that doesn't stop her from being an impressively feisty little thing. Beware the Nice Ones: Po is a very excibaleAction Girl. Bilingual Bonus: Po is able to speak Cantonese, thanks to original actor Pui Fan Lee.

characters.name: The Tiddlytubbies
characters.description: The baby offspring of the original Teletubbies that appear in the 2015 reboot. Their names are Mi-Mi, Daa Daa, Baa, Ping,RuRu, Nin, Duggle Dee, and Umby Pumby. Ambiguously Brown: Baa and Duggle Dee have slightly darker skin tones than the other Tiddlytubbies; however, it's hardly noticeable unless they're seen with other Tiddlytubbies. Colour-Coded Characters: Each Tiddlytubby has a rainbow-themed colour, as follows:Red - Duggle DeeOrange - Ru RuYellow - Umby PumbyGreen - Daa-DaaBlue - Mi-MiIndigo - BaaViolet - NinPink - Ping Gender-Equal Ensemble: Four males (Daa-Daa,Ru Ru, Duggle Dee and Baa) and four females (Umby Pumby, Ping, Mi-Mi and Nin). Iconic Item: Daa Daa's Tiddlynoo, Ping's xylophone, and Umby Pumby's teddy bear.

characters.name: Noo-Noo
characters.description: The vacuum of the Teletubbies, he is small and blue. He is sometimes naughty and sucks up the Teletubbies' things but gives them back in the end. He also helps out the Teletubbies by cleaning up their messes and cleaning up the house. Adaptation Dye-Job: He was repainted orange for the reboot. Most likely done to makingChroma Keyinghim easier. Catchphrase: "Suck, slurp, suck, slurp!" Jerk with a Heart of Gold: At times, Noo-Noo will suck up the Teletubbies' favorite things and run away with them, but he always gives them back in the end. Phrase Catcher: "Naughty Noo-Noo!"

characters.name: Baby Sun
characters.description: The baby-faced sun girl of Teletubbyland. She appears at the beginning and end of each episode, and also pops up randomly to react to whatever is going on. Audience Surrogate: According toWord of God, Baby Sun was meant to give the viewers someone to laugh along with. The Face of the Sun: One of the most famous examples on children's television of a sun with the face of a baby girl. The Hyena: She laughs in almost every scene she appears in. The Nth Doctor: Interestingly, in the Netflix version of the reboot, each episode has a different baby play the role of Baby Sun. This may be why there's no longer a yellow filter placed over them, as to make it more apparent.

characters.name: The Lion
characters.description: The big scary lion is an animatronic who entertains the Teletubbies and enjoys giving them a good scare. His performance involves hunting and chasing an equally creepy-looking bear. Badass Boast: Claims to have big scary teeth, and be scary around the front, back, top, and underneath. Bowdlerise: Due to the original sketch beingtoo scary, the sketch ended up being edited to be less scary...if you're not in the US. Cool Board: Because he is a slap of cardboard shaped like a lion, he is unable to walk but can travel amazingly fast on a board with wheels on it. Evil Sounds Deep: In the original cut he spoke with a thunderous, growling baritone that was made even more powerful by thereverberation of his voice, but later releases changed it to a campier voice.

characters.name: The Bear
characters.description: A wooden bear who enjoys playing hide-and-seek with the big scary lion. She is a friend to the Teletubbies and enjoys performing for them. She has a rather cheeky and playful personality. Artistic License – Biology: Bears are not prey to lions. In fact, they are pretty capable of overpowering a lion in a fight. Cloudcuckoolander: Tells the audience that she'll tell a joke, her "joke" involving her rolling her each eye independantly and sticking her tongue out. Cool Board: Her primary mode of transportation, given that she is a plank of wood shaped like a bear. Fragile Speedster: She's fast, but apparently much weaker than a normal bear. A REAL bear wouldn't flee from a lion.
